title: ACES-GST Application: Important Maintenance Activity on July 11, 2026
content:
# ACES-GST Application: Important Maintenance Activity on July 11, 2026

Ek important update hai. Government ne ACES-GST Application mein ek scheduled maintenance activity announce kiya hai. Taxpayers ko accordingly apni activities plan karni hongi.

Yeh maintenance activity **July 11, 2026** ko hone wali hai.

*   **Maintenance Date:** July 11, 2026
*   **Maintenance Timings:** Shaam 6:00 PM (18:00 Hours) se raat 11:00 PM (23:00 Hours) tak.
*   **Impacted Services:** Is duration mein Central Excise, Service Tax, HSNS, SBS, aur SVLDRS se related services available nahi hongi.
*   **Advisory Date:** Advisory dated July 9, 2026 (as per announcement).

Taxpayers ko advise kiya gaya hai ki woh is maintenance window ko consider karte huye apni filing aur other related activities pehle se hi plan kar lein, taaki koi inconvenience na ho.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://cbic-gst.gov.in/aces.html)

*Published on: 11 July 2026*
